title: Industrial Guidance — The Director
description: The union rep warns the party about the Director and points them toward the factory's upper levels.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: The Director's office is at the top of the main factory. Only elevator in Rivet Row. It opens when the Director decides it opens.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: Clear enough of the production floor and the system will flag you for 'direct engagement.' That's when the elevator comes.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: Fair warning — the Director doesn't punish. The Director restructures. It's worse.
